name: Red, White and Berry Blue
recipeIngredient: 1 package JELL-O Brand Gelatin Berry -Blue flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the JELL-O gelatin berry blue and strawberry flavors by mixing each with boiling water and cold water separately.
2. Pour each mixture into separate 8-inch square pans.
3. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours or until firm.
4. Cut the cooled JELL-O into cubes.
5. Layer the blue and red cubes evenly with COOL WHIP in individual glasses.
